untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) 52-week high comparison using 252-day lookback — Donchian Channel (dc_upper) approximates but is typically 20-day; (2) 'Stock is in top 25% of sector by relative strength' requires sector-relative comparison and ranking which is not available in single-stock indicators; (3) 'Avoid buying within 20% of 52-week low' requires calculation of 52-week low threshold which cannot be expressed with allowed operators. These three conditions cannot be accurately translated.
translation_notes: Partial translation: Entry conditions 1-3 capture the trend-following essence (price above Donchian upper as proxy for 52-week high, bullish SMA alignment, price above medium-term MA). Exit condition captures trend reversal. Missing: sector relative strength percentile ranking, 52-week low avoidance buffer, and relative strength drop to 50th percentile exit condition. Regime set to TRENDING_UP as most appropriate match for the intent.
